# ENT — license & distribution information

**Component name:** ENT (ent) — a pseudorandom number sequence test program  
**Author / source:** John Walker — Fourmilab. Homepage: https://www.fourmilab.ch/random/  

## License statement (authoritative)
Fourmilab (John Walker) publishes ENT as **public domain software**. Quoting the project pages and documentation, “This software is in the public domain. Permission to use, copy, modify, and distribute this software and its documentation for any purpose and without fee is hereby granted, without any conditions or restrictions.” See the Fourmilab ENT pages and documentation for original text.
